title: The Abyss II - The Other Side - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting
description: Adds Compatibility Between The Abyss II - The Other Side & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [The Abyss II - The Other Side](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-abyss-chapter-ii) (CurseForge Only) & [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-abyss-ii-the-other-side-farmers-delight-bark)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods are Required!

Types:

- Blaru,

- Bog Shroom,

- Frozen,

- Jungle,

- Sal Shroom,

- Slimed.

- All Types have,

- Door,

- Log,

- And Trapdoor Types,

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
